description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a cross-gabled roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are primarily white, complemented by a wooden base trim that wraps around the structure. Large windows are grouped along one side, providing ample natural light, while the front features a covered entryway with a small porch. A driveway leads up to the main entrance, and two chimneys are visible at the rear. The house sits on a spacious green lawn, with a paved path and driveway extending from the street.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a cross-gabled dark gray roof, wooden trim, large side windows, and a front porch with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, and the gabled roof with two chimneys visible at the back.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway leading to the front door, large grouped windows on the right, and the wooden trim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back gable, driveway, and the two chimneys, with less window visibility.
description_view_3: Side view showing a large window on the projecting gable and the wraparound wooden trim, with the lawn extending around the house.
